title: Meta and Anthropic Discuss $10B AI Infrastructure Agreement
excerpt: Meta Platforms Inc. (NASDAQ: $META) is in talks to lease as much as $10 billion of computing capacity to Anthropic,...
content_html:
CryptoProwl

Fri, July 17, 2026 at 7:47 PM PDT 2 min read

Meta Platforms Inc. (NASDAQ: $META) is in talks to lease as much as $10 billion of computing capacity to Anthropic, opening a possible path into the AI cloud market as demand for chips and data center access continues to tighten.

Anthropic proposed the two-year arrangement in June and would make monthly payments for access to Meta's infrastructure. Both companies could leave the agreement early, while the final value and terms remain subject to change.

The talks remain preliminary, but a completed agreement would mark a new direction for Meta. The company has built vast computing capacity for its own AI models without yet turning that infrastructure into a service for outside customers.

More From Cryptoprowl:

  • Major U.S. Banks Join U.K. Government's Tokenization Taskforce

  • Hyperliquid HIP-3 Volume Nears 50% as Onchain Stock Trading Accelerates

  • MEXC Reports 7.1 Billion USDT in SpaceX Futures Volume as Q2 Closes the Gap to Wall Street

  • SBI Group, DigiFT, and Startale Group Advance Tokenized Capital Markets with JPYSC-Powered Settlement and Onchain Dividend Distribution

  • MEXC Adds Five Ondo Tokenized Stocks Spanning Semiconductors to Power Infrastructure

The talks could open a new commercial lane for Meta's expanding AI infrastructure. After spending heavily on chips, power and data centers for its own models, the company may now have an opportunity to generate revenue from unused capacity while moving closer to specialist providers such as CoreWeave (NASDAQ: $CRWV) and Nebius (NASDAQ: $NBIS).

CEO Mark Zuckerberg said at Meta's shareholder meeting in May that entering cloud computing was "definitely on the table." He added that companies were approaching Meta almost every week about access to its models or spare computing power.

Anthropic, meanwhile, has been securing infrastructure across several providers as Claude adoption and developer demand expand. The company struck a separate agreement in May to use the computing power of SpaceX's Colossus 1 facility in Memphis and recently signed a 20-year data center lease with TeraWulf (NASDAQ: $WULF).

The latest talks arrive as Anthropic prepares for a possible public listing as early as October. Locking in additional capacity would give the AI developer more room to train models, run inference and support new products ahead of a potential market debut.

Meta is still building primarily for its own AI ambitions. A $10 billion Anthropic lease would show how quickly that infrastructure could become a business of its own.

Meta Platforms Inc. (NASDAQ: META) is currently trading at $646.01 U.S. per share.

content_html_zh:
加密警戒

太平洋夏令时间 2026 年 7 月 17 日星期五晚上 7:47 阅读 2 分钟

Meta Platforms Inc.（纳斯达克股票代码：$META）正在洽谈向 Anthropic 租赁高达 100 亿美元的计算能力，随着对芯片和数据中心访问的需求持续收紧，开辟进入人工智能云市场的可能途径。

Anthropic 在 6 月份提出了为期两年的安排，并将每月支付 Meta 基础设施的访问费用。 两家公司可能会提前退出协议，但最终价值和条款仍可能发生变化。

谈判仍处于初步阶段，但完成的协议将标志着 Meta 的新方向。 该公司已经为自己的人工智能模型建立了巨大的计算能力，但尚未将该基础设施转变为为外部客户提供的服务。

更多来自 Cryptoprowl 的内容：

  • 美国主要银行加入英国政府的代币化工作组
  • 随着链上股票交易加速，Hyperliquid HIP-3 交易量接近 50%
  • MEXC 报告 SpaceX 期货成交量达 71 亿美元，第二季度缩小与华尔街的差距
  • SBI Group、DigiFT 和 Startale Group 通过 JPYSC 驱动的结算和链上股息分配推进代币化资本市场
  • MEXC 增加五只 Ondo 代币化股票，涵盖半导体和电力基础设施

此次会谈可能会为 Meta 不断扩展的人工智能基础设施开辟一条新的商业通道。 在为自己的型号投入大量资金用于芯片、电源和数据中心之后，该公司现在可能有机会从未使用的产能中获得收入，同时向 CoreWeave（纳斯达克股票代码：$CRWV）和 Nebius（纳斯达克股票代码：$NBIS）等专业供应商靠拢。

首席执行官马克·扎克伯格 (Mark Zuckerberg) 在 5 月份的 Meta 股东大会上表示，进军云计算“肯定是摆在桌面上的”。 他补充说，公司几乎每周都会与 Meta 联系，询问其模型或备用计算能力的访问权限。

与此同时，随着 Claude 的采用和开发人员需求的扩大，Anthropic 一直在保护多家提供商的基础设施。 该公司于 5 月份达成了一项单独协议，使用 SpaceX 位于孟菲斯的 Colossus 1 设施的计算能力，并最近与 TeraWulf（纳斯达克股票代码：$WULF）签署了为期 20 年的数据中心租约。

最新的谈判即将到来，Anthropic 正准备最早于 10 月份上市。 锁定额外容量将为人工智能开发人员提供更多空间来训练模型、运行推理以及在潜在市场首次亮相之前支持新产品。

Meta 的建设主要是为了实现自己的人工智能目标。 价值 100 亿美元的 Anthropic 租赁将表明基础设施能够以多快的速度成为自己的业务。

Meta Platforms Inc.（纳斯达克股票代码：META）目前的交易价格为每股 646.01 美元。
